'''damuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nias|nias]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nias|nias]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| damuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmivith|dæmivith]] || [[word:dæmivij|dæmivij]] || [[word:dæmivish|dæmivish]] || [[word:dæmivi|dæmivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:damumuvuth|damumuvuth]] || [[word:damumuvuj|damumuvuj]] || [[word:damumuvush|damumuvush]] || [[word:damumuvu|damumuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:damuvuth|damuvuth]] || [[word:damuvuj|damuvuj]] || [[word:damuvush|damuvush]] || [[word:damuvu|damuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:damufvuth|damufvuth]] || [[word:damufvuj|damufvuj]] || [[word:damufvush|damufvush]] || [[word:damufvuf|damufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damuvuthu|damuvuthu]] || [[word:damuvuju|damuvuju]] || [[word:damuvushu|damuvushu]] || [[word:damuvuku|damuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damuvuth|damuvuth]] || [[word:damuvuj|damuvuj]] || [[word:damuvush|damuvush]] || [[word:damuvu|damuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damuvuthul|damuvuthul]] || [[word:damuvujul|damuvujul]] || [[word:damuvushul|damuvushul]] || [[word:damuvukul|damuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damuvuthuthu|damuvuthuthu]] || [[word:damuvujuju|damuvujuju]] || [[word:damuvushushu|damuvushushu]] || [[word:damuvuku|damuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damuvuthun|damuvuthun]] || [[word:damuvujun|damuvujun]] || [[word:damuvushun|damuvushun]] || [[word:damuvukun|damuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damuvuthuoro|damuvuthuoro]] || [[word:damuvujuoro|damuvujuoro]] || [[word:damuvushuoro|damuvushuoro]] || [[word:damuvukuoro|damuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
